text: Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-A (Designation of state interstate routes) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 145-B — State interstate routes

Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-A (Designation of state interstate routes) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Those highways specified and described as such pursuant to Highway Law § 340-A (Designation of state interstate routes) .
